title: 2025 12 30 Direct Offer
html:
TL;DR

  • 8-section discovery-to-close script for rankett's AI-visibility service: Opening → Live Demo → Show Their World → Solution → Terms → ROI Math → Risk Removal → Close. Designed for a 30–45 min call.
  • Price/terms: $3,500/month, 3-month minimum, then month-to-month. Guarantee: if client responds to leads in 15 min and uses script, but no 50% lift in booked calls by month 4, work continues free.
  • The "nuclear weapon" is the live demo — running the prospect's URL through Rankett's tool against 30+ AI prompts and showing their real-time gap vs. 2–3 named competitors (e.g., "you're at 40%, Competitor A is at 60%").
  • ROI framing is per-deal: dentist ($2k avg) needs ~1.5 extra calls/mo to break even, 3 calls = $2.5k ahead — reframes "can I afford $3.5k?" as "can I afford NOT to capture AI search demand?"
  • Technical deliverables stack: robots txt/llm txt/structured schema + Core Web Vitals + 3–5 authority profiles (linkedin, BBB, Capterra) + automated content engine across reddit/Quora/blog.

Notes

This is the late-2025 productized version of the rankett offer — the script Yahir hands sales contractors so anyone can run the call. Companion to the ai visibility engine concept page and the earlier rankett strategy notes. The "month 1 = 1 hour from you" framing is intentional: it removes onboarding-chaos fear, which Yahir identified earlier as the #1 SMB objection.

Vertical examples in the script lean dentists and roofers — Yahir's two ICP wedges. The "we can do this with your existing SEO guy" handler exists because Rankett's wedge is the AI layer that traditional SEO agencies don't yet cover (see ai search optimization).

Post-call collateral list (1-page agreement, one-pager summary, timeline graphic, 2–3 case studies, tech stack doc) is meant to neutralize the "let me discuss with my partner/accountant" objection — most common late-call blocker.

Connections

  • rankett — the productized offer this script monetizes
  • ai visibility engine — the underlying technical concept
  • elevator pitch — same family of selling-frame docs
  • max effort commit — guarantee structure embodies the all-in posture

related.label: Rankett 12-Month Business Plan — $100k/mo target, 3-tier ladder, hard non-negotiables
